title: LOTR Night Sky
description: I wanted to play vanilla minecraft with the night sky from the Lord of the Rings mod, so I made it a resource pack.
body:
I wanted to play vanilla minecraft with the night sky from the Lord of the Rings mod, so I made it a resource pack.

DO NOT USE WITH SODIUM
sodium breaks vanilla shaders, on which this pack relies

I DID get permission from the creator of the mod to use his asset in this pack. All credit goes to ChildWalrus for making the texture.

Links:

ChildWalrus:https://www.curseforge.com/members/childwalrus

LOTR 1.7.10:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lord-of-the-rings-mod-legacy

LOTR 1.15:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-lord-of-the-rings-mod-renewed

This pack uses BalintCsala/minecraft-vanilla-skybox as a template.

https://github.com/BalintCsala/minecraft-vanilla-skybox

[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a4883838950998d67143440012948c2410ff03.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3131)
